CustomField.formula: If( ProjectManagementAllowancePackage__c = true,"PM Allowance %", If( ExpenseAllowancePackage__c = true,"Expense Allowance %", IF( SupplierCostsGroup__c = true, "Supplier Costs Group", IF( Option__c = true, "Option", IF( Intro__c = true, "Intro", If( Outro__c = true, "Outro", ""))))))
CustomField.label: Line Item Checkbox Info
